name: Elysian Serenity Villa & Private Pool
description: Experience luxury redefined at Elysian Serenity. Nestled in a quiet valley, this stunning property offers a seamless blend of contemporary high-end design and natural elements. Features panoramic floor-to-ceiling windows, an infinity pool overlooking the horizon, and a private chef upon request.

name: The Obsidian Ridge Cabin
description: A striking dark-facade modern cabin suspended over the mountain edge. Designed for minimalists who crave luxury. Unwind in the glass-walled hot tub while stargazing or enjoy your morning espresso with low-hanging clouds right outside your deck.

name: Azure Waves Heritage Beachfront Resort
description: Walk directly out onto pristine golden sand beaches. This beautifully preserved heritage structure offers premium wood carvings alongside state-of-the-art modern automated features. Includes beachside dining open exclusively for guests.
